name: Monolingual to Multilingual: Evaluating Mamba for ASR [2607.01502]
content: arxiv:2607.01502 Monolingual to Multilingual: Evaluating Mamba for ASR [2607.01502]
summary: This paper evaluates the performance of Mamba for ASR in a monolingual to multilingual setting.
key_insights: Mamba shows promise as an ASR model for handling multilingual data efficiently.
The evaluation suggests potential improvements and areas for future research.
Understanding its limitations could lead to better integration with existing systems.
xihe_relevance: Mamba的评估结果可能对曦和系统的性能提升有潜在价值。
